post.summary: Creates a project by copying data from an existing project.
post.description: Creates a new project by copying an existing project definition including its child entities, such as project elements with their child entities and project team members with their entitlements. If requested the operation also copies the related project demands and settlement rules. The new project is saved as an active version.
